fn remove_zeros(data: &mut Vec<i32>) {
    while let Some(pos) = data.iter().position(|x| *x == 0) {
        data.remove(pos);
    }
}

fn pop_front_items(queue: &mut Vec<String>) -> Vec<String> {
    let mut result = Vec::new();
    while !queue.is_empty() {
        let item = queue.remove(0);
        result.push(item);
    }
    result
}

fn drain_matching(data: &mut Vec<u64>, threshold: u64) {
    while let Some(pos) = data.iter().position(|x| *x < threshold) {
        data.remove(pos);
    }
}

fn process_queue(items: &mut Vec<WorkItem>) {
    while !items.is_empty() {
        let item = items.remove(0);
        process_item(item);
    }
}

struct WorkItem { id: u64 }
fn process_item(_item: WorkItem) {}
